text:
How do you price your services/product? 

Never do cost-plus pricing, price according to the value your workflow is delivering. 

Saving the founder 10 hours per week? 10 * 4 * $35/hr = $1400/mo, $16800/yr. Personally, I charge 30% to 40% of what it saves in a month.
name: Yick Ho Pang

text:
1/9 Your finance team spends 12 hours per week on invoice data entry.

They open PDFs, type fields into NetSuite, route for approval, mark as paid.

This is the most automatable workflow in finance, and almost nobody's done it.
